overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a witch character in a blue coat and pointed hat walking through a snowy medieval wizarding village. The character crosses a stone bridge, passes through a timber-framed entrance archway marked 'Hogsmeade,' and explores the cobblestone streets lined with half-timbered buildings and festive greenery.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone bridge toward the village entrance archway

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide stone bridge toward a village entrance. The scene is open to the overcast winter sky, with snow-covered medieval buildings visible in the distance. A villager in a brown coat passes by on the left as the character approaches the large timber-framed archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered timber entrance gateway with Hogsmeade sign

events.description: entering the covered wooden archway entrance to the village
moving from bright outdoor light into the darker sheltered space under the timber roof

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered entrance archway beneath the Hogsmeade sign

notable_agents.action: villager in dark robes standing near the right wall of the archway

entered.detail: intricate timber-framed roof structure with heavy wooden beams
red banner with gold lettering reading 'Hogsmeade' hanging from the archway
rough stone walls flanking the entrance passage

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the timber-framed archway into a semi-covered entrance tunnel. The lighting dims as the character moves under the heavy wooden roof structure with the red Hogsmeade banner hanging overhead. Stone walls flank the passage as the character approaches the village interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone village street lined with timber-framed shops

woman in blue top and long skirt passes close by on the left
slight turn to the right as the street curves toward the central plaza

agents.ego_description: walking down the main village street, observing the shops and other villagers

entered.detail: medieval half-timbered shop fronts with snow-dusted roofs and glowing windows
medieval half-timbered shop fronts with overhanging upper stories
garlands of green foliage and lights strung across the street between buildings
distinctive tall building with steeply pitched roof at the end of the street
large hanging cauldron sign outside a shop front

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the narrow cobblestone main street of the village, lined with snow-dusted timber-framed shops and houses. Green garlands hang across the street overhead. The character passes villagers including a woman in blue and a seated figure on a bench, while walking toward a distinctive tall spired building visible at the end of the winding street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, snowy bridge into the enclosed and bustling streets of a medieval wizarding village. It begins with the character crossing a wide stone bridge under an overcast winter sky, passing a villager in a brown coat while approaching a large timber-framed archway. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a dim, semi-covered entrance tunnel where a red Hogsmeade banner hangs from a heavy wooden roof. The camera then emerges from the passage into the bright, narrow main street, where the environment opens up to reveal snow-dusted shops and festive green garlands strung overhead. Finally, the character passes several villagers along the cobblestones, moving deeper into the village toward a tall spired building at the end of the winding road.
